textByHash.ff5baf0fbf8b6bcc8687bbaca9f012bcfc233ca9: I'm working. What do you have to say that's so urgent?
textByHash.a7fc74c78dae6921085c2156d9b82e307d9046da: There's a lot of space here. More open space than back home.
textByHash.753baa728763f242817238c46887d846a97b1b6a: Pollnivneach. It's a town to the south of the Shantay Pass.
textByHash.0c31a7021540fe70f77bb16461c396c7ba25d64f: I'm on guard duty. Making sure nobody tries to steal anything from the house and tents in the middle of town.
textByHash.049e7695062a390cae34f6c2b74e7d8761a0baae: That's all I've been hired to guard.
textByHash.c0898a079ecb096c9bd44c183e06db5d763f4b70: Yeah, he hired me. He owns this house and these two tents, too.
textByHash.8aa36f7aa46fc3c2bcfdc8eed20e2d418aa4e80e: It pays better than back home.
textByHash.0e9ba972e7af4539f97af3c517333c617e01ef60: But Ali Morrisane pays us well, at least.
textByHash.9d195915bb43353ee3fd71c7379e4148050ee16d: Why not? He always likes to meet potential business partners.
textByHash.804887bfbb44241387fd060830f512a8c4e0aafe: Why bother? None of them can fight back, after all.
